@if(provider && acccess_token && userId) {

Creating an account using your {{provider}}

@if ((submitted || registerForm.get('firstName')?.touched) && registerForm.get('firstName')?.hasError('required')) { First Name is required } @if ((submitted || registerForm.get('firstName')?.touched) && (registerForm.get('firstName')?.hasError('minlength') || registerForm.get('firstName')?.hasError('maxlength'))) { First Name must be between 3 and 15 characters long }
@if ((submitted || registerForm.get('lastName')?.touched) && registerForm.get('lastName')?.hasError('required')) { Last Name is required } @if ((submitted || registerForm.get('lastName')?.touched) && (registerForm.get('lastName')?.hasError('minlength') || registerForm.get('lastName')?.hasError('maxlength'))) { Last Name must be between 3 and 15 characters long }
@if (errorMessages.length > 0){
}
}
